description: Empty buffer completion: a no-condition buffer that accumulates zero events emits nothing (not an empty array) when its upstream completes.

fixtures.name: Empty no-condition buffer emits nothing
fixtures.description: The single input event is dropped by a filter, so the buffer's incoming edge completes with nothing accumulated. The buffer emits no array; the graph output stream is empty.

graph.description: filter drops all events; downstream no-condition buffer receives nothing.
